settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage account identity and Arena access from one place.
settings.languageHint: Choose your interface language for the app.
settings.infoHint: Review product background and privacy policy.

system.reCalibrateHint: Reset the first-run spotlight tour and return to Home.

settings.supportHint: Need help or have feedback? Contact the official support channel.
settings.signInFail: Sign-in did not complete. Please try again. If no sign-in window appears, allow pop-ups and check your network connection.
settings.deleteHint: Deleting your account removes cloud-linked identity and cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete your account now? This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteRequiresRecentLogin: For security, please sign in again before deleting your account.
settings.deleteReauthFail: Re-authentication did not complete. Please allow the Google sign-in prompt and try again.
settings.deleteCloudPartial: Account deleted, but part of cloud data cleanup will continue in background.
settings.deleteAuthFail: Unable to delete account at this time. Please try again later.
settings.deleteNotAllowed: Only signed-in Google accounts can use delete account.
